name: Connect Jenkins to JFrog Artifactory
name_cn: 将 Jenkins 连接到 JFrog Artifactory
hint: Install the JFrog plugin in Jenkins and configure Artifactory server credentials
hint_cn: 在 Jenkins 中安装 JFrog 插件，配置 Artifactory 服务器凭证

name: Create Artifactory repositories for Jenkins builds
name_cn: 为 Jenkins 构建创建 Artifactory 仓库

name: Run a Jenkins pipeline that builds and publishes to Artifactory
name_cn: 运行 Jenkins 流水线，构建并发布制品到 Artifactory
hint: Create a pipeline job using the provided Jenkinsfile and trigger a build
hint_cn: 使用提供的 Jenkinsfile 创建流水线任务并触发构建

name: Publish Build Info from Jenkins to Artifactory
name_cn: 从 Jenkins 发布 Build Info 到 Artifactory
hint: Ensure the pipeline includes jf rt build-publish step and verify in Artifactory UI
hint_cn: 确保流水线包含 jf rt build-publish 步骤，在 Artifactory UI 中验证

name: Trigger Xray scan on the Jenkins build
name_cn: 对 Jenkins 构建触发 Xray 扫描
hint: Add jf rt build-scan to the pipeline and verify scan results in Artifactory
hint_cn: 在流水线中添加 jf rt build-scan，在 Artifactory 中查看扫描结果
